## [03:01 - 04:28]

Click through rate is slightly lower than the other ad set, but overall extremely similar soft stats. So when you get into a situation like this, where you have essentially two personas that have shown to be very, very, very strong and very viable, which one do you pick? Well when it comes down to like a race that tight, you essentially just need to ask your client. So you ask your client which persona would you prefer to work with? Would you prefer to work with Facebook marketers or would you prefer to work with coaches? For me personally, even though I work with Facebook marketers on a day to day basis and agency owners, I have an understanding that if I go after the Facebook marketer persona, it means that most of the students will likely be rolling out Facebook ad courses. So it's just a decision that I need to make because that's obviously going to skew the culture of the program and also possibly even the Q&A sessions, the training that I have. So at this stage, I might actually go into the unknown. I might actually go in unknown territory just for fun. And because of this, I'm going to pick coaches and it literally comes down to a personal decision because the soft stats are so similar and both of these audiences are proving extremely viable.
